race.comment: YES YES BOSS (11) led for the judge but was overwhelmed late over this distance on a heavy track at Muswellbrook last start. Good effort the run before when beaten just a length over 900m here at big odds. Looks hard to toss in an even contest. Lightly raced filly INTO BROOKLYN (5) is back from a 16-week break. Last appeared when she led all the way to win her maiden over this distance at Muswellbrook. In good hands and should go on to better things this time in work. SOLAR BLAST (3) returned from a two-month lay-off and was having his first run for trainer Gavin Groth when an eye-catching second over this distance at Tamworth last time out. Down sharply in class and has placed at four of five runs over this trip so the race sets up nicely. ECHELON (4) was plain first-up and may need one more but dropping back from 1150m to 1000m is a big help. PROVENCAL (10) has not raced since January 2025. Very effective five-furlong sprinter who is in a new yard now. Betting holds the key.
